message.content:
Remove unused code from these files. Only delete code, do not add anything.

1. src/redux/ducks/forgotPassword.ts - Remove unused State on line 39

2. src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts - Remove unused items on lines 21-23, 86, 88

3. src/redux/ducks/homeInvoices.ts - Remove unused items on lines 16-19, 99

4. src/redux/ducks/invoice.ts - Remove unused items on lines 7-12, 129-130, 134-135

5. src/redux/ducks/invoices.ts - Remove unused items on lines 17-20, 103

6. src/redux/ducks/invoices/barcode.ts - Remove unused items on lines 5-8, 11, 79-80, 83

7. src/redux/ducks/invoicesList.ts - Remove unused items on lines 5-12, 166, 168

8. src/redux/ducks/liveness.ts - Remove unused items on lines 6-10, 21, 84

Read each file, make the necessary deletions, keep files well formatted.

content.text: Now I'll make the necessary deletions in each file.
